baseline_type_notes: Snapshot of one passing run of the real clinical-extractor against synthetic_case_01.pdf via the sica-evals harness. Captures the quality ceiling reachable with claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 + prompt v0.1.0 on a deliberately-clear synthetic PDF. NOT a clinically validated baseline. Real clinical baselines arrive with retrospective dataset from the partner (issue #5).
non_determinism_note: Claude is non-deterministic (no seed). Re-running this same input will produce factual_accuracy in roughly [0.90, 1.00] range based on observed variance; the metric numbers below are a single sample, not a reproducible exact value. To verify the model has not degraded, re-run the harness and check that the new run also passes all R0 gates — do NOT expect to match these exact numbers.
command: python -m sica_evals.cli run --filter synthetic_case_01 --extractor clinical --format all --output-dir evals/reports
